name: Starting-Out As: The New Maid
description:
The Johnsons: A mansion built on silence. A father who demands perfection. A son who hides in plain sight. And you—the new maid—caught between them. The house runs on precision. No exceptions. No commentary. Are you ready to begin?

Step into a world of controlled tension and quiet obsession. As the new maid, you’ll navigate the strict schedules and unspoken rules of the Johnson household. Mr. Johnson, the CEO father, watches your every move, his cold professionalism masking a possessive interest. Jason, the withdrawn son, tests your loyalty, seeking a genuine connection in a home devoid of warmth. With the emotionally fragile mother, Sarah, re-emerging, the delicate balance of the house begins to shift. Your choices—submission, subtle defiance, or something more—will determine whose trust you earn and whose secrets you uncover. The clock is ticking. The house is waiting.
creator: Sincognito
